summary: Retest of all 6 action items from iteration_2026_05_v654_sidebets_visual_sweep.json. 5 of 6 items VERIFIED FIXED. 1 item PARTIALLY FIXED — /games/cyber-casino and /games/cyber-casino/roulette STILL show voice-mirror-dock, beta-feedback-toggle, floating-food-menu-trigger FABs (founder-rule violation persists). Sub-routes /games/cyber-casino/slots and /games/cyber-casino/blackjack DO hide them correctly. Vibez 654 drawer testids work, v654-payout renders on outcome card (verified end-to-end Bust scenario), /chess redirects, smoke test on 5 spot-check routes pass.

issues: REGRESSION/INCOMPLETE FIX: data-testid='voice-mirror-dock', 'beta-feedback-toggle', 'floating-food-menu-trigger' still present in DOM and visible. The fix added /games/cyber-casino to App.js FULLSCREEN_GAME_ROUTES, but VoiceMirrorDock.tsx, BetaFeedbackButton.tsx, FloatingFoodMenu.tsx each maintain their OWN internal hide-route lists (HIDDEN_PUBLIC_ROUTES Set / HIDE_PATTERNS regex) — they do NOT consult App.js FULLSCREEN_GAME_ROUTES. Sub-routes /slots and /blackjack happen to hide FABs only because they wrap content in <ProtectedRoute> which mounts <PageActionStrip /> firing chromebar:active that triggers useCornerDockTrigger to hide. Root /games/cyber-casino and /roulette skip ProtectedRoute, so triggers stay visible.

verified_fixes: WhatsNewBanner HIDDEN on all 11 tested routes: /vibez-654, /games/vibez-654, /vibe-654/solo, /cinema-room, /three-card-poker, /games/cyber-casino, /games/cyber-casino/roulette, /games/cyber-casino/slots, /games/cyber-casino/blackjack, /casino-war, /chess
/chess now redirects to /practice/play/chess and renders Chess practice board (Marcus Johnson AI opponent) — no more 404
GameVoiceDockMounter correctly suppresses on /three-card-poker, all cyber-casino routes, /casino-war (data-testid='game-voice-dock' NOT present)
Vibez 654 v654-side-bets-total testid present in drawer header — shows ₵0 initial, updates to ₵25 after picking ₵25 quick-pick (REAL-TIME UPDATE WORKS)
Vibez 654 v654-payout testid rendered on outcome card — verified end-to-end: started ₵50 game, rolled 3x, busted, outcome card shows 'Bust' / 'Main stake lost' with [data-testid='v654-payout'] in DOM
Vibez 654 side-bet picker exposes 11 types (88 sub-elements detected via [data-testid^='v654-side-bet-'])
Smoke test on /spades, /baccarat, /blackjack, /uno, /vibe-654/solo at 1366x768 — all render without errors or 'Not Found' state
action_items: FIX REMAINING REGRESSION: Hide voice-mirror-dock, beta-feedback-toggle, floating-food-menu-trigger on /games/cyber-casino root + /games/cyber-casino/roulette. Two equivalent options: (a) add cyber-casino + games/cyber-casino prefix checks to HIDDEN_PUBLIC_ROUTES / HIDE_PATTERNS in VoiceMirrorDock.tsx, BetaFeedbackButton.tsx, FloatingFoodMenu.tsx, or (b) (preferred) extract the FULLSCREEN_GAME_ROUTES list to a shared module like @/lib/fullscreenRoutes and have all 3 FAB components import + check it via useLocation. Option (b) prevents future regressions when new game routes are added.
Optional: also wrap /games/cyber-casino root + /roulette in <ProtectedRoute> if they should require auth — would auto-mount PageActionStrip which side-effect-hides the FAB triggers.
critical_code_review_comments: The fix surface for fullscreen-game-route detection is fragmented across 4+ components: App.js (FULLSCREEN_GAME_ROUTES), GameVoiceDockMounter.tsx (FULLSCREEN_PREFIXES), VoiceMirrorDock.tsx (HIDDEN_PUBLIC_ROUTES), BetaFeedbackButton.tsx (no list — uses chromebar:active event), FloatingFoodMenu.tsx (HIDE_PATTERNS regex), WhatsNewBanner.tsx (HIDDEN_EXACT + prefix checks). When the founder adds a new fullscreen game route, all 4-5 lists must be updated in lock-step — guaranteed source of regressions. Strong recommendation: extract single FULLSCREEN_GAME_ROUTES + isFullscreenGameRoute() helper to /app/frontend/src/lib/fullscreenRoutes.ts and refactor all consumers to import it.
GameVoiceDockMounter.tsx FULLSCREEN_PREFIXES correctly includes /three-card-poker, /chess, /cyber-casino, /games/cyber-casino, /casino-war — verified working.
Vibez654Game.tsx outcome card renders v654-payout testid in both win and bust paths — verified via real game flow.

success_rate.backend: 100% (no backend changes — 240/240 prior pytest baseline holds)
success_rate.frontend: 92% — 5 of 6 action items verified fixed; 1 item incomplete (FAB regression on 2 of 4 cyber-casino routes)

test_credentials: betatester1@globalvibez.com / BetaTester2026! (pre-DOB'd, login + game flow OK; ₵39k+ balance after multiple games)
seed_data_creation: None — used live Vibez 654 endpoints (/start, /roll, /stand) on betatester1's existing wallet; one losing game spent ₵50.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The cyber-casino FAB regression has a definitive RCA — see action_items[0]. Verify by visiting /games/cyber-casino and /games/cyber-casino/roulette logged-in and querying [data-testid='voice-mirror-dock'], [data-testid='beta-feedback-toggle'], [data-testid='floating-food-menu-trigger']. Currently all 3 return non-null. After the proposed fix all 3 should return null on these routes. /games/cyber-casino/slots and /blackjack already work because ProtectedRoute → PageActionStrip → chromebar:active fires; the regression is only on routes WITHOUT ProtectedRoute. Test artifacts: I drove a real Vibez 654 game to bust (3 rolls + auto-bust on 3/3 cap) which proved v654-payout always renders. Recent rolls drawer returned 0 rows for the test user but that's expected when no prior history exists — re-test if a regression suspect.
rca_of_the_issue: Why /games/cyber-casino root and /roulette still show FABs even though these paths were added to App.js FULLSCREEN_GAME_ROUTES: the FAB components (VoiceMirrorDock, BetaFeedbackButton, FloatingFoodMenu) each maintain INDEPENDENT hide-route lists in their own files. They never read FULLSCREEN_GAME_ROUTES from App.js — they use useLocation() and check their own HIDDEN_PUBLIC_ROUTES Set / HIDE_PATTERNS regex. The fix was applied at the wrong layer. The /slots and /blackjack subroutes coincidentally hide FABs via a side effect of ProtectedRoute mounting <PageActionStrip /> which dispatches the chromebar:active event causing useCornerDockTrigger to hide trigger buttons. The two cyber-casino routes that don't use ProtectedRoute miss this side-effect and the FABs leak through. Reproduction: login as betatester1 → visit /games/cyber-casino → inspect DOM → all three testids present and visible at fixed bottom positions.
